creator: keichii@iteration.net
text:
On Wed, Dec 20, 2000 at 10:27:37PM +0000, mcf@dmu.ac.uk scribbled:
| >Number:         23700
| >Category:       kern
| >Synopsis:       AMD 756 Power Management Controller / SMBus driver
| >Confidential:   no
| >Severity:       non-critical
| >Priority:       medium
| >Responsible:    freebsd-bugs
| >State:          open
| 

Do you mind generating a diff against -current in addition
to simply putting the tarball on http for easier fetching?

| >Description:
| 
| Here's a driver for the AMD 756 Power Management Controller's
| System Management Bus function. It doesn't currently support the
| SMBus process call, but I intend to add this. The devices
| it provides are: amdpm and amdsmb.
|
